name: Summer Squash with Cheese (Calabacitas Con Quezo) 1911
recipeIngredient: 1 pound American cheese, sliced into 1/4-inch-thick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the summer squash into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
2. Boil the squash in salted water until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Rinse and let cool.
4. Slice the American cheese into 1/4-inch-thick pieces.
5. Make sandwiches with 2 squash slices and 1 cheese slice.
6. Beat the egg whites until stiff.
7. Stir in the flour.
8. Beat the egg yolks and fold them into the egg whites.
9. Melt lard over medium heat.
10. Dip each sandwich in the egg mixture.
11. Fry in hot lard until lightly browned, about 3 minutes per side.
12. Serve hot.
